description: Hidden gems and trending spots from H2 2025 / 2026

name.ja: ノー・ルーム・フォー・スクエアズ

description.en: A speakeasy jazz bar hidden behind a retro Coca-Cola vending machine in the Shimokitazawa Reload complex. Intimate vinyl-spinning sessions with craft cocktails.
description.ja: 下北沢リロードの自動販売機の奥に隠れたジャズバー。レコードとクラフトカクテルの親密な空間。

address.en: Reload Complex, 2 Chome Kitazawa, Setagaya-ku, Tokyo
address.ja: 東京都世田谷区北沢2丁目 リロード内

tips: Look for the Coca-Cola vending machine — the entrance is behind it
No reservation needed for drinks, but live events have cover charges
Opens at 8 PM Mon-Tue, earlier on weekends

description.en: Beloved Shimokitazawa izakaya with a sunken counter bar facing the chef. Famous for nikujaga, sashimi, and karaage. English menu available and the all-you-can-drink course is great value.
description.ja: 下北沢の愛されている居酒屋。カウンターで目の前の調理を楽しめる。肉じゃが、刺身、唐揚げが人気。

address.ja: 東京都世田谷区下北沢

tips: Sit at the sunken counter bar for the best experience
2-hour all-you-can-drink course at 5,500 yen is excellent value
English menu available — one of the few izakayas with this

description.en: A 5-story complex under Shimokitazawa Station with 19 eclectic shops and restaurants. Pan-Asian dining (Japanese, Korean, Thai, Vietnamese) plus trendy bars, maintaining the area's bohemian spirit.
description.ja: 下北沢駅下の5階建て複合施設。日本、韓国、タイ、ベトナム料理とバーが19店舗。

address.en: Under Shimokitazawa Station, 2 Chome Kitazawa, Setagaya-ku, Tokyo
address.ja: 東京都世田谷区北沢2丁目 下北沢駅高架下

best_times.en: Dinner time 6-9 PM for full atmosphere

tips: Outdoor seating mimics yokocho side-street vibes
Korean and Thai restaurants are standouts
Great for group dining with varied tastes

name.ja: フラワーアンドウォーター下北沢

description.en: The wildly popular Nakameguro bakery-cafe and Italian bar opens a second location in Shimokitazawa in March 2026. Fresh bread, brunch plates, and natural wine in a cozy setting.
description.ja: 中目黒の行列店が2026年3月下北沢に2号店オープン。焼きたてパン、ブランチ、ナチュラルワイン。

address.en: 3-min walk from Shimokitazawa Station, Setagaya-ku, Tokyo
address.ja: 東京都世田谷区 下北沢駅徒歩約3分

tips: Brand new March 2026 opening — expect lines initially
The Nakameguro original is always packed — this location may be less crowded
Try the fresh bread with natural wine pairing

name.ja: ラーメンジャジービーツ

description.en: DJ-turned-ramen-chef's second shop under the Nakameguro railway tracks (opened Aug 2024). Tori Nibo paitan ramen made with heritage Amakusa Daio chicken from Kumamoto.
description.ja: 中目黒高架下のDJ出身ラーメン店主の2号店。熊本の天草大王鶏を使った鶏煮干しパイタン。

address.en: Under the railway tracks, Nakameguro, Meguro-ku, Tokyo
address.ja: 東京都目黒区中目黒 高架下

tips: Tori Nibo Ramen (from 1,380 yen) is the signature — milky, fragrant chicken broth
Also serves shoyu, shio, and mazesoba versions
Under the train tracks — the rumble adds to the atmosphere

description.en: A back-to-basics ramen shop in Nakameguro (opened 2024) bringing old-fashioned style ramen as an everyday meal. Standard bowl at just 950 yen — honest, no-pretense noodles.
description.ja: 中目黒の新しいラーメン店。昔ながらのスタイルを950円で。飾らない、毎日食べたいラーメン。

address.ja: 東京都目黒区中目黒

tips: Standard bowl is just 950 yen — rare for Nakameguro
Old-fashioned style meant as everyday comfort food
Less hyped than trendy ramen spots — that's the appeal

description.en: Took over the space of legendary Chuka Soba Shibata. Top-tier ingredients in a clean, lightly flavored Umashio Soba combining pork, chicken, and seafood with Mongolian salt. All at 1,000 yen flat.
description.ja: 伝説の中華そばしばたの跡地。豚・鶏・魚介をモンゴル塩で仕上げたうましお蕎麦1,000円。

address.ja: 東京都内（最新の場所をご確認ください）

tips: Named one of the best new ramen of 2025 by Time Out Tokyo
Umashio Soba is the signature — light yet deeply flavored
Flat 1,000 yen is fair for the quality

name.ja: アマムダコタン ドーナツ中目黒

description.en: Fukuoka's famous bakery Amam Dacotan took over the old Starbucks counter under Nakameguro Station for a takeaway nama (fresh) doughnut stall. 8 varieties from just 240 yen.
description.ja: 福岡の人気ベーカリーが中目黒駅高架下の旧スタバに出店。生ドーナツ8種類240円から。

address.en: Under Nakameguro Station (former Starbucks counter), Meguro-ku, Tokyo
address.ja: 東京都目黒区中目黒駅高架下（旧スターバックス跡）

best_times.ja: 午前10-11時 売り切れ前

tips: Nama (fresh) doughnuts from just 240 yen each
Popular flavors: plain, framboise with raspberry cream cheese, lemon glaze with pistachio
Sells out early — go in the morning

description.en: An izakaya inside a traditional wooden house in Kagurazaka's cobblestone alleys. Seasonal washoku course meals at reasonable prices, plus a standing bar area with drinks under 500 yen.
description.ja: 神楽坂の石畳路地にある木造の居酒屋。季節の和食コースと500円以下の立ち飲みエリア。

address.ja: 東京都新宿区神楽坂

tips: Standing bar area has drinks under 500 yen
Seasonal course meals with handpicked ingredients
Traditional wooden house interior — authentic experience

description.en: Omakase-only sushi hidden on the 2nd floor of Honda Yokocho alley in Kagurazaka. The chef hand-selects seasonal fish daily from trusted Toyosu wholesalers.
description.ja: 神楽坂のホンダ横丁2階に隠れたおまかせ鮨。築地の信頼する仲卸から毎日仕入れ。

address.ja: 東京都新宿区神楽坂4-3 TKビル2F ホンダ横丁内

tips: Omakase course only — no a la carte
Located on the 2nd floor of Honda Yokocho — easy to miss
Reservation essential

description.en: A refined Kagurazaka izakaya pairing seasonal Japanese banquet dishes with curated craft sake. Chef Yusuke Miyashita opened in 2011 and it remains a local secret in the cobblestone alleys.
description.ja: 神楽坂の石畳にある季節の日本料理とクラフト日本酒のペアリング居酒屋。宮下裕介シェフの隠れ家。

address.ja: 東京都新宿区神楽坂

tips: Known for expert sake pairings with each course
Hidden in Kagurazaka's cobblestone back alleys
Reservation recommended

description.en: A Kagurazaka izakaya specializing in seasonal seafood and charcoal-grilled dishes from Toyosu market. Their motto: 'Sake, Fish, and Love.' Open for both lunch and dinner.
description.ja: 神楽坂の豊洲直送の海鮮と炭火焼き専門居酒屋。モットーは「酒と魚と愛」。

address.ja: 東京都新宿区神楽坂4-8

best_times.en: Lunch 11 AM-3 PM or dinner 5-10:30 PM

tips: Lunch sets are great value compared to dinner
Fresh seafood straight from Toyosu market daily
The charcoal-grilled dishes are standouts

description.en: A hidden refuge in Golden Gai with 250+ spirits, sake, and shochu. Features a small tatami loft at no extra charge. Perfect escape from Kabukicho's neon chaos.
description.ja: ゴールデン街の隠れ家バー。250種以上のスピリッツと小さな畳ロフト付き。歌舞伎町の喧騒からの避難所。

address.en: Golden Gai, 1 Chome Kabukicho, Shinjuku-ku, Tokyo
address.ja: 東京都新宿区歌舞伎町1丁目 ゴールデン街

tips: 250+ spirits including rare Japanese whisky, sake, and shochu
Small tatami loft upstairs — no extra charge
One of the more foreigner-friendly Golden Gai bars

description.en: A tiny 15-seat Golden Gai bar where a sake sommelier serves curated nihonshu alongside homemade miso soup and onigiri. Perfect for ending (or starting) a night out.
description.ja: ゴールデン街の15席の小さなバー。唎酒師が選んだ日本酒と自家製味噌汁・おにぎり。

address.ja: 東京都新宿区花園一番街 ゴールデン街

tips: Order miso soup and onigiri as a late-night snack — the perfect shime (meal to end drinking)
Sake sommelier picks are excellent
Only 15 seats — cozy and intimate

name.ja: バー・プラスチックモデル

description.en: A nostalgic Golden Gai bar paying homage to 80s-90s pop culture. Surrounded by retro toys, memorabilia, and curated music from Japan's cultural golden age.
description.ja: 80-90年代ポップカルチャーへのオマージュを捧げるゴールデン街のバー。レトロ玩具と当時の音楽に囲まれた空間。

address.ja: 東京都新宿区ゴールデン街

tips: Paradise for 80s-90s Japanese pop culture fans
Run by the current Golden Gai association chairman
Check the walls — full of nostalgic memorabilia

name.ja: ティル・ナ・ノーグ銀座

description.en: A secret cocktail bar in Ginza behind an iron door, decorated like a Celtic enchanted den with butterflies, fairy statues, and bottles of magic dust. Hugely popular with Tokyo locals.
description.ja: 銀座の鉄扉の奥に広がるケルト神話をモチーフにした秘密のカクテルバー。蝶々と妖精の装飾。

address.ja: 東京都中央区 東銀座駅近く

tips: Look for the iron door — the entrance is deliberately hard to find
Celtic myth-inspired decor is enchanting
Very popular with locals — may need to wait

description.en: A Showa-era retro kissaten in Shimokitazawa famous for photogenic cream sodas. Also operates as a night cafe, perfect for post-theater or post-live-music drinks.
description.ja: 下北沢の昭和レトロ喫茶。映えるクリームソーダが人気。夜カフェとしても楽しめる。

address.ja: 東京都世田谷区下北沢

best_times.en: Afternoon or late evening for night cafe vibes
best_times.ja: 午後またはナイトカフェとして夜

tips: Cream sodas are the star — very photogenic
Showa-era retro interior is charming
Also great as a night cafe after live shows

name.ja: 猿田彦珈琲 イブニングバー

description.en: By day, Shimokitazawa's beloved Sarutahiko Coffee. By evening (from 7 PM), it transforms into a cocktail bar serving coffee cocktails made with premium beans, plus mocktails and bites.
description.ja: 下北沢の猿田彦珈琲が夜7時からカクテルバーに変身。プレミアム豆のコーヒーカクテルとモクテル。

address.ja: 東京都世田谷区下北沢

tips: Coffee cocktails made with Sarutahiko's premium beans are unique
Transforms from cafe to bar at 7 PM
Mocktails available for non-drinkers

name.ja: もんじゃストリート 月島

description.en: Nearly 50 restaurants on one street serving monja — Tokyo's own runny, DIY teppanyaki dish (like a gooier okonomiyaki). A hidden gem mostly known only to Japanese food enthusiasts.
description.ja: 月島のもんじゃストリート。約50店舗が並ぶ東京のソウルフード。日本のグルメ通だけが知る隠れた名所。

address.ja: 東京都中央区月島もんじゃストリート

best_times.en: Lunch 11:30 AM-2 PM or dinner 5:30-8 PM

tips: Monja is Tokyo's own street food — different from Osaka's okonomiyaki
Staff will cook it for you if you're unsure of the DIY technique
Mentaiko cheese monja is a popular flavor

description.en: Tokyo's oldest underground shopping arcade (1955), now a time-capsule of tiny ramen joints, vintage barbershops, fortune-teller booths, and hole-in-the-wall eateries. Barely any tourists venture here.
description.ja: 1955年開業の東京最古の地下商店街。小さなラーメン店、レトロ床屋、占い、居酒屋のタイムカプセル。

address.en: Asakusa Underground Street, near Asakusa Station, Taito-ku, Tokyo
address.ja: 東京都台東区浅草 浅草駅付近地下

tips: Tokyo's oldest underground shopping arcade — opened in 1955
Counter-seat ramen joints and hole-in-the-wall bars are the highlights
Most tourists walk right past it to Senso-ji — that's why it's a gem

description.en: A traditional public bathhouse in Nakameguro redesigned by architect Kentaro Imai. Soft white interiors, a Mt Fuji mural by graffiti artist Gravity Free, and hot soaking pools.
description.ja: 中目黒の建築家リニューアルの銭湯。白を基調とした内装とグラフィティアーティストの富士山壁画。

address.ja: 東京都目黒区中目黒

tips: Designer sento — modern take on traditional Japanese bathhouse
Mt Fuji mural by graffiti artist Gravity Free is stunning
Bring your own towel or buy one at the front desk

description.en: A nostalgic shopping street in Tokyo's old-town Yanaka district. Local artisan sweets, handmade crafts, sake shops, and cat-themed goods. The famous 'Yuyake Dandan' sunset stairs are at one end.
description.ja: 谷中の懐かしい商店街。地元職人の菓子、手作り工芸品、酒屋、猫グッズ。夕焼けだんだんの階段が名物。

address.ja: 東京都台東区谷中銀座

best_times.en: Late afternoon 3-5 PM for sunset stairs
best_times.ja: 午後3-5時 夕焼けだんだんの時間

tips: Visit at sunset for the famous Yuyake Dandan stairs view
Try the cat-tail doughnuts from local bakeries
Many shops are handmade goods by local artisans

description.en: A hidden rooftop bar inside Asahi Beer's headquarters in Asakusa. No entry fee — just buy a drink and enjoy views of Senso-ji, Sumida River, and Tokyo Skytree. Barely any tourists know about it.
description.ja: 浅草のアサヒビール本社内の隠れた展望バー。入場無料、ドリンク1杯で浅草寺・隅田川・スカイツリーの絶景。

address.en: Asahi Beer Tower, 1-23-1 Azumabashi, Sumida-ku, Tokyo
address.ja: 東京都墨田区吾妻橋1-23-1 アサヒビールタワー

best_times.en: Late afternoon to evening for sunset views
best_times.ja: 夕方〜夜 夕日の時間帯

tips: No entry fee — just buy a drink
Views of Senso-ji, Sumida River, and Skytree all at once
Most tourists don't know this bar exists

description.en: Tucked under the Shinkansen bullet train tracks near Yurakucho Station. Salary workers flock here for cheap yakitori and beer as trains rumble overhead. Pure Tokyo atmosphere.
description.ja: 有楽町駅の新幹線高架下。サラリーマンが集う安い焼き鳥とビール。列車の轟音が東京の雰囲気そのもの。

address.en: Under the tracks near Yurakucho Station, Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo
address.ja: 東京都千代田区有楽町 高架下

best_times.en: Weekday evenings 6-9 PM with the salaryman crowd
best_times.ja: 平日夕方 18:00-21:00 サラリーマンと一緒に

tips: Go on a weekday evening for the full salaryman after-work experience
Cheap yakitori and beer — most items under 500 yen
The rumble of Shinkansen overhead is part of the charm
